shared_attributes.movement: scroll left (ground at Current_Speed, clouds at Current_Speed * 0.5)

context.role: Visual baseline and collision reference for ground level
context.screen_position: y=0px (ground level), spans entire screen width, scrolls left at Current_Speed
context.usage_scenario: Provides visual reference for ground level, defines y=0 collision line for player landing, scrolls to create movement illusion

visual_specification.texture: Solid pixel line, no texture variation

animation.description: No sprite animation. Movement is position-based scrolling. When x < -1200, reset to x += 1200 for seamless tiling

visual_specification.details: Simple 2px thick horizontal line in primary color, tiles seamlessly at 1200px intervals

relationships.shared_with: Same color as ground_texture, same y position (0px) as all ground obstacles
relationships.differences_from: ground_texture is optional decorative layer above this line. Ground_line is mandatory collision reference
